name: Use of a Broken or Risky Cryptographic Algorithm
description: The product uses a broken or risky cryptographic algorithm or protocol (e.g., MD5, SHA1, DES, RC4) for which well-known attacks exist, undermining the confidentiality, integrity, or authenticity guarantees the cryptography was meant to provide.
detection_pattern: A TRANSFORM[encryption|hashing] node uses a known-weak algorithm (MD5, SHA1, DES, RC4, ECB mode) to protect sensitive data flowing to STORAGE or EGRESS nodes, rather than using a strong algorithm (AES-256, SHA-256+, bcrypt, Argon2)
